allow: Bash(python -c "import xgboost; import lightgbm; import shap; import sklearn; print\(''xgb:'', xgboost.__version__, ''lgb:'', lightgbm.__version__, ''shap:'', shap.__version__, ''sklearn:'', sklearn.__version__\)")
